name: BankNexus
description: Digital banking assistant with balance inquiry, fund transfer, and transaction history capabilities

BankNexus_Supervisor.description: Top-level orchestrator for the BankNexus digital banking assistant

Fund_Transfer.description: Handles fund transfers with validation, limits checking, fee calculation, and execution

Get_Balance.description: Retrieves and displays account balances with formatted output

Transaction_History.description: Displays filtered and formatted transaction history with TRANSFORM pipeline
